subject_output:
```yaml
# Level: fault_lines_07_the_chasm
# Tier: 3
# Region: fault_lines

name: "The Chasm"
author: "Embergrave Team"
description: |
  A descent through a vertical fault line shaft. Navigate narrow ledges and
  precise jumps to collect ember pickups and reach the bottom safely.
  The chasm below is deadly, so precision is key.

# Level settings
settings:
  # Physics parameters (default values)
  gravity: 1200
  jump_force: 400
  dash_force: 300
  glide_force: 150
  ember_dim_rate: 0.1
  ember_regen_rate: 0.05
  ember_max: 10

# Player starting position (top of shaft)
player:
  x: 100
  y: 20

# Platforms - vertical descent with varying platform shapes and positions
platforms:
  # Platform 1 - Starting platform
  - id: "platform_01"
    x: 90
    y: 80
    width: 20
    height: 10
    type: "solid"

  # Platform 2 - Narrow ledge
  - id: "platform_02"
    x: 110
    y: 130
    width: 10
    height: 10
    type: "solid"

  # Platform 3 - Horizontal platform
  - id: "platform_03"
    x: 70
    y: 180
    width: 20
    height: 10
    type: "solid"

  # Platform 4 - Narrow ledge
  - id: "platform_04"
    x: 120
    y: 230
    width: 10
    height: 10
    type: "solid"

  # Platform 5 - Diagonal platform
  - id: "platform_05"
    x: 90
    y: 280
    width: 15
    height: 10
    angle: 15
    type: "solid"

  # Platform 6 - Horizontal platform with gap
  - id: "platform_06"
    x: 70
    y: 330
    width: 20
    height: 10
    type: "solid"

# Checkpoints along the natural descent path
checkpoints:
  # Checkpoint 1 - After platform 2
  - id: "checkpoint_01"
    x: 115
    y: 140
    width: 10
    height: 10

  # Checkpoint 2 - After platform 5
  - id: "checkpoint_02"
    x: 95
    y: 290
    width: 10
    height: 10

# Ember pickups (4 total, 8 ember capacity)
ember_pickups:
  # Pickup 1 - Near platform 1
  - id: "ember_01"
    x: 105
    y: 70
    value: 2

  # Pickup 2 - Near platform 3
  - id: "ember_02"
    x: 90
    y: 170
    value: 2

  # Pickup 3 - Near platform 4
  - id: "ember_03"
    x: 125
    y: 220
    value: 2

  # Pickup 4 - Near platform 6
  - id: "ember_04"
    x: 85
    y: 320
    value: 2

# Exit point (bottom of shaft)
exit:
  x: 100
  y: 380
  width: 10
  height: 10

# Lethal area below exit
lethal_areas:
  # Lava/void region at bottom of shaft
  - x: 0
    y: 390
    width: 200
    height: 50
    type: "lava"

# Visual elements (optional for level designers)
visuals:
  background_color: "#1a1a1a"
  platform_color: "#4a4a4a"
  exit_color: "#ffcc00"
  lethal_color: "#ff3300"
```
